Best Finish
$24.99

Express Wash with Hand Dry

The complete express experience — every premium treatment from our signature wash, elevated with a meticulous hand dry by our detail team. No streaks, no water spots, just a flawless finish that speaks for itself.

⭐ FREE Self-Service Vacuum
  • ✔ Soft Lambscloth Wash

✦ Why upgrade? Air drying leaves behind water spots. Our team hand dries every panel, window, and trim piece — delivering a mirror-like, showroom-quality finish that lasts.

Additional Vehicle

Add Another Car to Your Plan

🎉 20% OFF — Save $5/month per car
$19.99/mo

Keep every vehicle in the household looking its best. Add a second (or third) car to your existing membership at a reduced monthly rate — full unlimited access, same great washes.

Why Join the Club?

  • 🚗  Wash as often as you like — daily if you want
  • 💳  One simple monthly charge, cancel anytime
  • ⚡  Skip the line with member priority access
  • 💰  Pays for itself after just 3 washes a month

🏆 The Full Treatment

Full Service

A complete hand-service experience — inside and out. Our team takes care of every detail so you drive away spotless.

Full Service

Standard Wash

$34.99

A thorough full-service clean covering everything your vehicle needs — hand dried, vacuumed, and treated inside and out.

  • ✔ Hand Dry Vehicle
  • ✔ Interior Vacuum
  • ✔ Wipe Seats & Dash
  • ✔ Clean Windows
  • ✔ Super Sealer Wax
  • ✔ Tri-Color Rainbow Wax
  • ✔ Underbody Rinse
  • ✔ Exterior Dressing
  • ✔ Air Freshener
  • ✔ Spot-Free Rinse
⭐ Best Value
Premium Detail

Top Wash

$44.99

Everything in the Standard Wash — plus shampooed floor mats and a full interior dressing for a deep-clean finish that looks and smells brand new.

  • ✔ Hand Dry Vehicle
  • ✔ Interior Vacuum
  • ✔ Wipe Seats & Dash
  • ✔ Clean Windows
  • ✔ Super Sealer Wax
  • ✔ Tri-Color Rainbow Wax
  • ✔ Underbody Rinse
  • ✔ Exterior Dressing
  • ★ Shampoo Removable Floor Mats
  • ★ Interior Dressing
  • ✔ Air Freshener
  • ✔ Spot-Free Rinse

✦ The Top Wash goes the extra mile — shampooed mats and a full interior dressing restore that fresh, like-new feeling from the inside out. The ultimate finish for those who settle for nothing less.

🔧 Additional Services

Other Provided Services

From deep interior detailing to engine cleaning — we offer a full range of specialty services to keep your vehicle in peak condition.

✨

Express Wax

Starting at $74.99

A quick protective wax coat to seal and shine your vehicle's exterior finish.

🧹

Carpet Shampoo

Starting at $74.99

Deep shampooing of all interior carpets to lift dirt, stains, and odors.

🪑

Seat Shampoo

Starting at $74.99

Thorough shampoo treatment for fabric or cloth seats — fresh and clean inside.

🧽

Interior Detail

Starting at $149.99

A comprehensive interior deep-clean covering every surface, panel, and crevice.

💡

Headlight Restoration

Starting at $74.99

Restore foggy or yellowed headlights to clear, bright factory condition.

🌊

Underbody Wash

Starting at $74.99

High-pressure undercarriage rinse to remove road grime, salt, and buildup.

⚙️

Engine Clean

Starting at $74.99

Professional engine bay degreasing and cleaning for a like-new look under the hood.

🏆

Interior & Exterior Detail

Starting at $200.00

Our most complete service — a full inside-and-out detail that covers everything from headlights to carpet.

Prices shown are starting prices and may vary depending on vehicle size, condition, and service requirements.

🐾 Furry Friends Welcome

Dog Wash

🐶 All Sizes Welcome

Officially providing top-of-the-line self-service dog wash equipment, focusing on pet safety, quality care, cleanliness, and customer satisfaction — to ensure your furry friend looks and feels their best.

🚿

Elevated Wash Stations

No bending over — easy on your back with raised tubs designed for comfort.

💨

High-Powered Dryers

Get your pup fully dry and fluffy before heading back to the car.

🧴

Shampoo & Supplies Provided

All towels, shampoo, and grooming tools included — bring just the dog.

✨

We Handle the Cleanup

No mess to deal with at home — we clean everything after every use.

💧 Purified & Fresh

Water Store

Conveniently fill up on high-quality purified water right here on-site. Great taste, great value — no trip to the grocery store needed.

💧

Pure Water
On Demand

Multi-stage filtered water available on-site. Bring your own container and fill up anytime.

💧 Purified Water

Fill Station

Multi-stage filtered, clean & refreshing. Bring any container and fill up anytime.

for Pricing
